chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitutional Petition No. D-1221 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For hearing of case (Priority). 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of CMA 4829/24 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case. 29.05.2025. Mr. Shehriyar Imdad Awan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh. ***************** Learned Assistant Advocate General Sindh places on record copy of Notification dated 24th April,2025 and submits that grievance of the petitioner has been redressed. Since no one is in attendance on behalf of petitioner, no intimation received. This petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE Irfan/PS
